refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute a Local Binary Pattern texture descriptor.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [descriptor, codes] = imlbp(image) [descriptor, codes] = imlbp(image, radius, points)

listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Positive integer neighborhood radius. Default is 1.
Number of sampled neighbor points, from 1 to 16. Default is 8.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes nearest-neighbor LBP codes and returns their normalized histogram together with the code image.

refsection.title: Examples
